title: Home builder, real estate services stocks surge on surprise jump in new home sales
text: Shares of housing market companies enjoyed a broad rally Friday, after data showing that new home sales surprisingly rose, and sharply, in the face of other signs showing a slowdown in the housing sector. The SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB, +3.04% rallied 2.9% in morning trading, with all 35 components trading higher.

title: 5 Broker-Favorite Stocks to Keep a Close Watch on

title: Builders FirstSource (BLDR) Up 4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?

title: Builders FirstSource Stock: What's The Forecast For The Rest Of 2022?
text: Builders FirstSource achieved strong and better-than-expected top line and bottom line growth in Q1 2022, which validates the stock's +56% share price gain for the last year. But BLDR's valuations are still undemanding on an absolute basis, and it also trades at a discount to its peers based on the forward EV/EBITDA and normalized P/E metrics.
